zh.lifeSummary: 當Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast於大約1138年出生時，他的父親Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast34歲，母親Agnes von Babenberg37歲。他於1177年與Ludmila Přemyslovna結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年5月16日享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast于大约1138年出生时，他的父亲Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast34岁，母亲Agnes von Babenberg37岁。他于1177年与Ludmila Přemyslovna结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年5月16日享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

en.lifeSummary: When Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast was born about 1138, his father, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, was 34 and his mother, Agnes von Babenberg, was 37. He married Ludmila Přemyslovna in 1177. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 16 May 1211, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast est né environ 1138, son père, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agnes von Babenberg, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Ludmila Přemyslovna en 1177. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 16 mai 1211, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast um 1138 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast 34 und seine Mutter Agnes von Babenberg 37. Er hat 1177 Ludmila Přemyslovna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 16. Mai 1211 im Alter von 74 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast è nato il circa 1138, il suo padre, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agnes von Babenberg, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Ludmila Přemyslovna nel 1177. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 16 maggio 1211, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mieszko I Plątonogi Piastが約1138年に生まれた時，父Władysław II Wygnaniec Piastは34歳，母Agnes von Babenbergは37歳であった。1177年にLudmila Přemyslovnaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年5月16日に74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast(이)가 대략 1138년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes von Babenberg(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1177년 Ludmila Přemyslovna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 5월 16일 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast nasceu aproximadamente 1138, seu pai, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Agnes von Babenberg, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Ludmila Přemyslovna em 1177. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de maio de 1211, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast родился около 1138 г., его отцу по имени Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes von Babenberg, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Ludmila Přemyslovna в 1177 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 16 мая 1211 г. в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mieszko I Plątonogi Piast nació aproximadamente 1138, su papá, Władysław II Wygnaniec Piast, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agnes von Babenberg, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Ludmila Přemyslovna en 1177. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 16 de mayo de 1211, a la edad de 74 años.
